name: Jo's 2-cheese Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce - (Worcestershire and Lea & Perrins)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the first 14 ingredients together by hand until well combined and place in a loaf pan.
3. Insert a knife in three places to ensure even cooking of the meatloaf.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
5. Increase the heat to 400°F and bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until the cheese begins to bubble.
6. Remove from oven and drain any excess juice from the pan.
7. Sprinkle all the Monterey Jack cheese evenly over the top of the meatloaf.
8. Return to oven for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the cheese melts completely and gives a frosted effect.
9. Serve 8 portions.
